ed.advance_vacuum.advanced_controls_hint: Suction/mop selectors, right menu, and configurable routines. In routines you can use `entity`, `label`, `icon`, `service`, `service_data`, or `tap_action`.
ed.advance_vacuum.animations_section_hin: Smooth card entry, panels, and visual feedback when tapping controls.
ed.advance_vacuum.general_section_hint: Robot entity and main map source. If labels do not match your profile language, choose Automatic in Card language (older configs may have Spanish saved).
ed.advance_vacuum.map_section_hint: The card automatically reuses your legacy `map_modes` and `icons` config if you paste it in YAML.
ed.advance_vacuum.security_section_hint: Controls whether external service actions (routines/menu) use a strict allowlist.
ed.advance_vacuum.shared_session_helper_: Optional: stores room selection, mode, and repeats in this helper to restore them across devices. Create an input_text in YAML and pick it here.
ed.advance_vacuum.shared_session_webhook: If users cannot call input_text.set_value, use the webhook_id of an automation that writes the same helper. POST /api/webhook/<id> with JSON {"value": "..."}.
ed.advance_vacuum.style_section_hint_map: Base visual settings for the map and bubbles.
ed.advance_vacuum.visibility_always_hint: Which elements you want to keep always visible.
ed.alarm_panel.animations_hint: Soft content entrance and a light bounce when tapping actions and the icon.
ed.alarm_panel.general_hint: Main entity, optional code helper entity, icon and base card behavior.
ed.alarm_panel.haptics_hint: Optional tactile feedback when tapping actions.
ed.alarm_panel.modes_section_hint: Arm and disarm buttons visible on the card.
ed.alarm_panel.styles_section_hint: Base visual settings for the card.
ed.calendar.accent_if_tint_off: Accent color (when automatic tinting is off)
ed.calendar.animation_section_hint: Soft entrance of the card content on load.
ed.calendar.calendars_section_hint: Add one or more calendar entities and reorder how events are merged.
ed.calendar.general_section_hint: Visible title, icon, time range, data refresh and native event options.
ed.calendar.haptics_section_hint: Vibration/haptic feedback on actions such as opening the calendar, deleting or creating events.
ed.calendar.native_webhook_hint: If set, creating a non-recurring native event uses the webhook instead of calling calendar.create_event directly. In the automation use trigger.json.service_data or branches by event_kind; do not fill empty fields.
ed.calendar.styles_section_hint: Visual settings for the card, typography and icon bubble.
ed.calendar.tint_auto_hint: Uses the theme primary color on the card. Turn off to set an accent color under Styles.
ed.calendar.weather_row_explainer: If set, each day row shows icon + min/max when a forecast exists for that date.
ed.circular_gauge.animations_hint: Controls dial transition, content entrance and tap bounce on the card.
ed.circular_gauge.general_hint: Main numeric entity, name, icon and gauge range.
ed.circular_gauge.layout_hint: Helps compact the gauge based on available space in the view.
ed.circular_gauge.styles_hint: Customize the Nodalia look, circular dial, thumb bubble and gauge tint scale.
ed.circular_gauge.visibility_hint: Header, chips and visible range options.
ed.climate.animations_hint: Dial transition, content entrance and button bounce.
ed.climate.general_hint: Main entity, visible name and card icon.
ed.climate.haptics_hint: Optional tactile feedback when using the dial and buttons.
ed.climate.haptics_hint_legacy: Optional haptic feedback for the dial and controls.
ed.climate.layout_hint: Helps compact the climate card based on available space.
ed.climate.styles_hint_legacy: Nodalia look and circular dial visuals.
ed.climate.styles_hint_main: Customize the Nodalia climate look, dial and controls.
ed.climate.visibility_hint: Choose which chips and controls are shown.
ed.entity.animations_section_hint: Soft content entrance and a light bounce when tapping the card or its actions.
ed.entity.content_section_hint: Visible state, extra chips, number decimals and compact layout behavior.
ed.entity.general_section_hint: Main entity, visible name and base card icon.
ed.entity.haptics_section_hint: Optional tactile feedback when using the card and its actions.
ed.entity.icons_state_hint: Optional: different icon when the card is active or inactive (binary_sensor, switches, doors, windows, etc.). If one is empty, the general or entity icon is used.
ed.entity.name: Name
ed.entity.quick_actions_hint: Secondary icon buttons to toggle, open more info or call a service.
ed.entity.style_card_radius_yaml_hint: For a custom value, set `styles.card.border_radius` in YAML.
ed.entity.styles_section_hint: Main visual settings for the card.
ed.fan.animations_section_hint: Smooth transitions when turning on/off, expanding controls, opening preset modes and button feedback.
ed.fan.preset_modes_hint: Hide fan modes you do not want on the card.
ed.fav.action_section_hint: What the card does when you tap it.
ed.fav.alarm_section_hint: Extra options when the entity is an alarm control panel.
ed.fav.general_section_hint: Favorite entity, visible name and main icon.
ed.fav.styles_section_hint: Base visual settings for the favorite card.
ed.fav.visibility_section_hint: Compact layout and visible elements inside the card.
ed.humidifier.animations_section_hint: Smooth transitions when turning on/off, expanding controls, switching panels and button feedback.
ed.humidifier.aux_section_hint: Optional selectors for main mode and fan ventilation.
ed.humidifier.fan_speeds_hint: Choose which fan speed options stay available.
ed.humidifier.haptics_section_hint: Optional tactile feedback when using the controls.
ed.humidifier.modes_hint: Hide modes the integration exposes but you do not want on the card.
ed.humidifier.styles_section_hint: Main visual settings for the card.
ed.humidifier.visibility_section_hint: Enable or hide each card block.
ed.insignia.haptics_hint: Vibration when tapping the badge (if the device supports it).
ed.insignia.section_hint: Compact chip for the insignia bar: optional entity, icon and text.
ed.insignia.tap_section_hint: What happens when you tap the badge.
ed.light.animations_section_hint: Smooth transitions when turning on/off, expanding controls, switching sliders and button feedback.
ed.light.auto_expand_controls: Expand brightness and color controls when the light turns on
ed.light.general_section_hint: Main entity, visible name and card icon.
ed.light.tap_actions_section_hint: Choose what happens when you tap the bulb vs. the rest of the card (title, chips, empty area).
ed.light.visibility_section_hint: Which blocks to show inside the card.
ed.media_player.animations_section_hint: Panel opening, media browser and button bounce timing.
ed.media_player.general_section_hint: General media player options and when the card should show.
ed.media_player.haptics_section_hint: Optional haptic feedback for player controls.
ed.media_player.layout_dashboard_hint: Ideal when pinned at the top or bottom of the dashboard.
ed.media_player.players_empty: You have not added any players yet.
ed.media_player.players_section_hint: Add, reorder and customize each player shown on the card.
ed.media_player.power_action_off: Power button when off or idle
ed.media_player.styles_section_hint: Visual settings for the main player and media browser.
ed.nav.anim_hint: Controls transitions for bar, popup, media player and visual feedback.
ed.nav.general_hint: Base bar options, layout and general visibility.
ed.nav.hint_yaml: You can already edit popup and media player here. For very advanced actions, YAML is still best.
ed.nav.media_section_hint: General options for the embedded player and visible players list.
ed.nav.no_route_popup: This route has no popup yet.
ed.nav.routes_hint: Add, reorder and customize bar destinations and their popups.
ed.nav.styles_hint: Visual settings for bar, buttons, popup and media player.
ed.nav.subtitle: Subtitle
ed.nav.title: Title
ed.notifications.animations_section_hint: Controls content entrance and card button bounce.
ed.notifications.connections_section_hin: Pick entities that feed alerts and recommendations. Each picker is one row and filtered by domain.
ed.notifications.custom_section_hint: Create your own alerts with entity, attribute and optional action conditions.
ed.notifications.general_section_hint: Message when nothing is pending and basic behavior.
ed.notifications.per_entity_section_hint: These fields override the global type. On mobile you can inherit, force send, or silence only that entity.
ed.notifications.security_section_hint: Controls whether custom service actions go through a strict allowlist.
ed.notifications.smart_alerts_section_hi: Customize text, color and buy/open links. Variables: {source}, {value}, {threshold}, {fan}, {time}.
ed.notifications.smart_alerts_subhint: Type defaults come first. Below you can override per entity — ideal for multiple windows, cartridges or distinct sensors.
ed.notifications.smart_empty_connections: Add entities under Smart connections to customize them one by one.
ed.notifications.smart_ph_media_message: {media} is still on and {source} detects no presence.
ed.notifications.styles_section_hint: Tune surfaces, visual tint and radii in the visual editor.
ed.notifications.sync_section_hint: Optional: sync dismissed alerts across devices and forward important alerts to notify services.
ed.notifications.thresholds_section_hint: Used for climate, fan, temperature and humidity recommendations.
ed.person.animations_section_hint: Soft content entrance and a light tap bounce.
ed.person.general_section_hint: Person entity, photo, zone icon and main card behavior.
ed.person.haptics_section_hint: Optional tactile feedback when tapping the card.
ed.power_flow.animations_hint_visual: Smooth flow entrance and bounce when tapping nodes or actions.
ed.power_flow.flow_hint_visual: Zero-flow lines and flow animation speed.
ed.power_flow.flow_hint_yaml: Show lines with no flow and animation speed.
ed.power_flow.general_hint: Title, energy dashboard link and general card behavior.
ed.power_flow.haptics_hint: Optional tactile feedback when tapping nodes or buttons.
ed.power_flow.node_battery_hint_visual: Battery power. Positive discharge, negative charge.
ed.power_flow.node_battery_hint_yaml: Battery power. Positive toward home, negative charging from home.
ed.power_flow.node_gas_hint: Gas flow or consumption toward the home.
ed.power_flow.node_grid_hint_visual: Positive import, negative export. When exporting, value is positive and subtitle shows grid delivery.
ed.power_flow.node_grid_hint_yaml: Grid sensor: positive import, negative export (split consumption/production allowed). When exporting, value is positive and subtitle shows grid delivery.
ed.power_flow.node_home_hint_visual: Optional: empty entity = calculated consumption (solar + grid + battery). With entity, sensor value is used.
ed.power_flow.node_home_hint_yaml: Optional: if entity is empty, consumption is calculated as solar + grid + battery (same signs as those nodes). If set, sensor is used. More-info uses grid/solar/battery when there is no home entity.
ed.power_flow.node_water_hint: Water flow or consumption toward the home.
ed.power_flow.style_section_hint: Base visual settings for the card and bubbles.
ed.vacuum.animations_section_hint: Visual feedback for robot buttons and panels.
ed.vacuum.aux_section_hint: Optional sensors and selectors to enrich state and controls.
ed.vacuum.general_section_hint: Main entity, visible name and tap behavior.
ed.vacuum.mop_modes_hint: Hide mop levels or modes you do not want to show.
ed.vacuum.styles_section_hint: Basic visual settings for the Nodalia look.
ed.vacuum.suction_modes_hint: Hide suction power modes you do not want on the card.
ed.vacuum.visibility_section_hint: Which elements to show inside the card.
ed.weather.animations_section_hint: Soft content entrance and a light tap bounce.
ed.weather.general_section_hint: Main weather entity, visible name, icon and displayed content.
ed.weather.haptics_section_hint: Optional tactile feedback when tapping the card.

ed.weather.styles_section_hint: Base visual settings for the card.
